title: Definitions / Terminology
content:
Repayment Day Branch -   If the total no. of scheduled Centre meetings are greater than 10, then branch will be considered as Repayment Day Branch.

Repayment Day Branch - If the total no. of scheduled Centre meetings are less than or equals to 10, then Branch will be considered as Non- Repayment Day Branch.

Repayment CO - If the total no. of scheduled Centre meetings are greater than 2, then that CO will be considered as Repayment CO

Non Repayment CO -  If the total no. of scheduled Centre meetings are Less than 2, then that CO will be considered as Non Repayment CO

title: Definitions / Terminology
content:
Matured Arrear Clients-  Clients whose loan tenure has been completed but are in arrears are called as Matured Arrear Clients.

Matured Arrear Centers - A Centre in which 100% clients exists in known as Matured Arrear Center.

Operational Branch -  Branches where disbursement of all products is allowed is known as operational branch.

Non Operational Branch -  Branches where disbursement of new clients at new centre is suspended due to spikes in the arrear but lending at graduated center is allowed. 




s.
